item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/07/06
item.description: After making the Polycat platformer game last year, we are teaming up again and trying something a little less twitch for Catjam 2026. We're making an interactive vignette based on Rek's Spines & Pincers universe.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/06/17
item.description: A beautiful visitor.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/06/16
item.description: Coffee and Ulysses.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/06/15
item.description: A wall of greenery.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/06/14
item.description: Jellyfish vision.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/06/12
item.description: While finishing up the last of Huxley's Island, 2 purple martins joined us, perched just above our heads outside. KARUNA! They said, in unison. ATTENTION!

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/06/11
item.description: A good parking spot.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/05/30
item.description: Installed a light strip just above the nav table to read at night, it makes a perfect reading light that doesn't cast hard shadows, it's different from a strip made of many small lights, that each cast a small shadow, this one is just one continuous light source, it's neat.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/05/27
item.description: Dramatic Montague Harbour sunset.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/05/24
item.description: The wind and current was perfect this morning, we made some coffee, lifted the sail, the anchor and just silently drifted off to where we wanted to go. We hadn't sailed off anchor in a long time. The conditions have to be perfect in these restricted channels.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/05/23
item.description: Away from the noise of the city until autumn.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/05/01
item.description: Re-did the cover for our companionway door, with new snaps and all!

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/04/08
item.description: We've accumulated many good jars over the years. These are perfect for storing dry foods.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/03/31
item.description: Devine drew a super busy spirograph(105 cycles) onto a letter for someone who purchased rabbit stickers. It's so pretty.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/03/29
item.description: Build once, run everywhere™ (Uxn)

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/03/17
item.description: Gamedev tools that nobody can ever take away from us.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/03/14
item.description: New ferments underway!

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/03/12
item.description: The Donsol splash on Playdate will have a randomly generated castle!

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/03/09
item.description: Punk rabbit stickers turned out so nice!

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/03/01
item.description: While in Spain We met up with Javier and Marcelino who gave us coffee and a book on celestial navigation, we will savor a cup while studying the sky.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/02/28
item.description: Polycat running on a 2009 EeePC under HaikuOS (photo by TBSP)

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/02/12
item.description: Spain has many beautiful statues.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/02/11
item.description: A small city surrounded by plains populated by vineyards and olive trees.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/02/10
item.description: Plaza Mayor de Chinchón.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/02/08
item.description: Wandering Chinchón, finding all these beautiful unique doors.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/02/07
item.description: We love that the Ink & Switch meetup began with a workshop to teach people to make a notebook for the event.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/02/06
item.description: Exploring Chinchón

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/01/31
item.description: For our friend's wedding(bagpipes were involved), Devine made us two pairs of arm warmers with the wallace red tartan.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/01/28
item.description: Pino on a mooring ball at Blakely Island, from last summers trip to the San Juans

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/01/18
item.description: A rebuilt Banjo Brothers backpack. The original bag was over 10 years old and was sun-worn and torn. Devine re-used the straps, front pocket and the liner and re-did the rest. It looks fantastic and will last for many more years.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/01/17
item.description: Devine also remade their own hat.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2026/01/11
item.description: We are making out own hats now!

item.title: Hundred Days - 2025/12/25
item.description: Our ritual for the 24th is to watch movies and make #origami decorations.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2025/12/21
item.description: Spending December evenings playing Neverhood.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2025/12/18
item.description: We've installed lights aboard Pino and it looks real pretty.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2025/12/17
item.description: Apres la pluie, la pluie.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2025/12/10
item.description: Every letter we send as Hundred Rabbits has a spirograph drawing at the back, I tend to mix and match cogs until I find a pattern I like. For a while now I was wondering if I could guess how many turns it takes to close a line based on the number of teeth and I JUST figured it out. First, I get the gcd(cog, ring), for example gcd(42, 96) = 6, then I take the ring teeth count and divide it by that number 96/6 = 16 turns, works every time.

item.title: Hundred Days - 2025/12/02
item.description: Progress on Donsol Playdate!

item.title: Hundred Days - 2025/11/20
item.description: 10 years ago today, we sat together at a coffee shop in Montreal, and puzzled over how we'd start a new life on the water. Hundred Rabbits is 10 years old!

item.title: Hundred Days - 2025/11/19
item.description: Printed and folded some orca zines for an upcoming workshop.
